description_long: This kiosk features a robust, angular structure with a metallic, industrial appearance. Its main body is composed of segmented panels, with a prominent, forward-leaning arm that supports a large, rectangular digital display screen. The screen is bordered by a metallic frame and displays a blue interface with circular icons, suggesting interactive functionality. The base is wide and sturdy, designed to provide stability, and the entire structure is finished in a dark, matte metal with some lighter metallic accents. There are no visible doors or windows, and the kiosk is clearly intended for public interaction, likely for information or ticketing purposes. The design is utilitarian, with clean lines and a focus on durability and functionality.
description: A sturdy, industrial-style kiosk with a large digital display and segmented metallic panels, designed for interactive public use. The structure is angular and robust, with a prominent screen and a wide, stable base.
description_view_0: Side view showing the narrow profile of the kiosk and the angled digital display extending outward.
description_view_1: Full side view highlighting the segmented arm, the large blue digital display, and the sturdy base.
description_view_2: Opposite side view showing the angled screen and the solid, panelled structure beneath it.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the back of the kiosk's arm and base, with no visible screen or interactive elements.
attribute_signage_type: digital display integrated into the front arm, showing blue interface with circular icons; no visible text
attribute_roof_design: flat, angular extension above the display, constructed from metal panels with no overhangs or decorative elements
